title: INtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Save $20 on Our Favorite Gaming Headset
items.description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova 3 have excellent compatibility and a comfortable, lightweight fit.

items.title: Discord delays global rollout of age verification after backlash
items.description: The company added that 90% of users won’t need to verify their age and will be able to keep using Discord as usual.

items.description: JBL's fabulous Flip 7 speaker is on super sale for $100. Grab this go-anywhere companion on the cheap before the nice weather hits.

items.title: Instagram’s TV app is launching on Google TV devices
items.description: By bringing Reels to TVs, Instagram looking to better compete with YouTube, which largely dominates the TV space.

items.title: The Last Mystery of Antarctica’s ‘Blood Falls’ Has Finally Been Solved
items.description: New research sheds light on what drives reddish water to emerge from underground to pour onto the Taylor Glacier.
